{{Event Header|StS2 Drowning Beacon.png}} {{E|Drowning Beacon|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|Bottle}} {{TS|positive||Procure 1 {{P|Glowwater Potion||2}}.}}
{{Frame|Climb}} {{TS|negative||Lose 13 Max HP.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain {{R|Fresnel Lens||2}} (relic).}} == Dialogue ==
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light. You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.
{{Frame|Bottle}}
Using a nearby bottle, you calmly scoop up the glowing liquid as the lighthouse peacefully sinks into the mud. Good thing you weren't in there.
{{Frame|Climb}}
You climb to the top of the lighthouse, unnerved by its steady sinking. Upon reaching the lanthorn room, you start prying off the lens as the anti-light saps your vitality! Finally, you wring it free; the lighthouse stops sinking.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
